subject: refactor(clean): extract shared utilities, reduce duplication
body:
findCheapestPrice(): Extracted duplicated reduce-based cheapest price
logic from 5 files (StationCard, FuelMapWeb, StationMarker, StationList,
share.ts) into a shared utility in formatting.ts.

stationValidation.ts: Extracted 150 lines of validation logic from
bulk-import.tsx (723 → 574 lines) into a separate, testable module.
